title: Extexport.exe
html:
Extexport.exe

Load a DLL located in the c:\test folder with a specific name.

Execute

Execute dll file

Extexport.exe {PATH_ABSOLUTE:folder} foo bar

Load a DLL located in the specified folder with one of the following names mozcrt19.dll, mozsqlite3.dll, or sqlite.dll. — MITRE: T1218 — Privileges: User
excerpt: Extexport.exe Load a DLL located in the c:\test folder with a specific name. Execute Execute dll file Extexport.exe {PATH_ABSOLUTE:folder} foo bar Load a DLL located in the specified folder with one of the following names mozcrt19.dll,…
